Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Bayview Iron Works, Inc.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Michael E. Hale of LMS, (415-400-7000) appearing for plaintifff.
No appearance by defendant.

PLAINTIFF OSVALDO MALAGON's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Bayview Iron Works, Inc. is granted, all responsive documents must be hand served to plaintiff's counsel within 30 days of receipt of this signed order. Order signed in open court. Party stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Trent Thornley Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)
